assertions.title: Focus order follows logical reading order

steps.observed: Single focusable element found: button 'Play'. Tab lands directly on it.
Focus lands on BUTTON with text 'Play'

steps.expected: Board squares, New Game, and Share buttons present
steps.observed: 29 focusable elements found: 25 board squares (button[aria-pressed]) + New Game + Share + 2 hidden links

steps.action: Tab through all elements on game page
steps.expected: Squares in left-to-right, top-to-bottom order, then New Game, then Share
steps.observed: Tab 1→'References a previous stream or video' (row1,col1), Tab 2→'Mentions cargo culting' (row1,col2), Tab 3→'Switches between 3+ editor windows rapidly' (row1,col3), Tab 4→'Blames Rust for something unrelated' (row1,col4), Tab 5→'Mentions living in San Francisco' (row1,col5), Tab 6→'Forgets to take out tea bag' (row2,col1) ... continuing through all 25 squares left-to-right top-to-bottom → Tab 27→'New Game' → Tab 28→'Share'

steps.expected: All squares in logical reading order (left-to-right, top-to-bottom)
steps.observed: DOM query confirmed 25 squares in correct left-to-right, top-to-bottom order with no coordinate inversions. Control buttons (New Game, Share) come after the board.

assertions.title: Color is not the only indicator of marked state

steps.expected: Game board loads with unmarked squares
steps.observed: Game board loaded with all squares unmarked (aria-pressed='false')

steps.action: Mark squares 0 and 1 via JS click
steps.expected: Squares become visually marked with non-color indicators
steps.observed: Marked squares show: (1) ✓ checkmark character in top-right corner (span with aria-hidden='true'), (2) line-through CSS class on text (strikethrough), (3) opacity-80 class reducing text opacity

steps.action: Inspect DOM for non-color differentiation indicators
steps.expected: At least one non-color indicator present on marked squares
steps.observed: Three non-color indicators found: ✓ checkmark overlay, line-through text decoration, and opacity change. Unmarked squares have plain text with no decorations.

markedSquare.innerHTML: ✓Square text

steps.action: Query heading elements on landing page /
Query heading elements on game page /game?seed=a11ytest2
steps.expected: Logical heading structure (h1 for app name, h2 for board/game)
steps.observed: Found 2 headings: h1 't3ingo', h2 'Bingo Board'. H2 is visually hidden (class='sr-only') but present in DOM for screen readers.

steps.action: Tab forward through all 29 focusable elements on game page
steps.expected: All elements receive focus without getting stuck; focus wraps back to first element
steps.observed: Successfully Tabbed through all 29 elements. After 29 Tab presses, focus wrapped back to the first element ('References a previous stream or video')

steps.expected: All elements receive focus in reverse without getting stuck
steps.observed: Shift+Tab from first element wrapped to 'Share' button, then 'New Game', then last board square. Reverse navigation works correctly with no traps.

steps.action: Verify no custom widget traps focus
steps.expected: No element traps focus - all can be left via Tab
steps.observed: No custom widgets with focus traps detected. All 29 elements are standard buttons and links that naturally release focus on Tab.

steps.action: Navigate to game page with reduced motion emulation enabled
Mark all 5 squares in row 1 to trigger bingo
steps.observed: All 5 row 1 squares marked (aria-pressed='true'). Bingo triggered.

steps.action: Inspect celebration element with reduced motion
steps.expected: Static/non-animated indicator shown instead of confetti animation
steps.observed: Static celebration banner displayed: div with data-testid='static-celebration', role='alert', aria-live='polite', textContent='🎉 BINGO! 🎉'. No animations (animationName='none'). No confetti canvas (canvasCount=0). Banner has border-2 styling with visible background color.

frictions.description: Rapid JS eval clicks on squares can cause toggle issues (clicks fire too fast and React state batching misses some). Using agent-browser find text click with 600ms delays between clicks resolves this.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser find text click with 600ms waits between each square click

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. Focus order is logical (squares left-to-right, top-to-bottom → New Game → Share). Marked state has three non-color indicators (✓ checkmark, line-through, opacity). Heading structure is correct (h1 for app name, h2 for board). No keyboard traps found. Celebration respects prefers-reduced-motion by showing a static '🎉 BINGO! 🎉' banner instead of confetti animation.
